entries.title: Todoroki Family Watches Endeavor With Mixed Feelings

context.label: Todoroki family processes Endeavor’s public stand

continuity.sourceBoundary: My Hero Academia manga chapters 1-430. Chapter 431 'More' is treated as an optional post-series extra overlay unless explicitly loaded.
continuity.notes: Anime-only scenes, movies, OVAs, Vigilantes, Team-Up Missions, light novels, games, and filler material are excluded from the primary deck family unless added as separate overlay decks.

content.fact: The Todoroki family’s reaction to Endeavor’s public fight is mixed: concern, resentment, hope, and unresolved pain coexist.
content.injection: Do not make the family reaction uniform. Fuyumi, Natsuo, Shoto, and Rei should carry different relationships to Endeavor’s attempt to change.

sourceInfo.title: My Hero Academia

context.label: Todoroki family processes Endeavor’s public stand

content.fact: Natsuo’s resentment toward Endeavor remains valid even after Endeavor’s public heroism.
content.injection: Keep Natsuo’s anger grounded. A heroic TV moment must not force forgiveness or closure.

entries.title: Fuyumi Wants Family Repair Without Erasing Harm

context.label: Todoroki family processes Endeavor’s public stand

continuity.sourceBoundary: My Hero Academia manga chapters 1-430. Chapter 431 'More' is treated as an optional post-series extra overlay unless explicitly loaded.
continuity.notes: Anime-only scenes, movies, OVAs, Vigilantes, Team-Up Missions, light novels, games, and filler material are excluded from the primary deck family unless added as separate overlay decks.

content.fact: Fuyumi wants some form of family repair, but that desire does not erase the harm Endeavor caused.
content.injection: Write Fuyumi as hoping for connection while still living inside the damage. Avoid making her optimism into proof everyone is healed.

content.fact: Shoto processes Endeavor’s public stand through both hero admiration and personal history as Endeavor’s son.

entries.title: Rei Recovery Is Distant And Ongoing

context.label: Todoroki family processes Endeavor’s public stand

content.fact: Rei’s recovery and distance from the family remain ongoing during this period; she is not simply restored to normal household life.
content.injection: Keep Rei’s presence careful and limited. Do not use Endeavor’s public victory to erase her trauma or hospitalization context.

content.fact: Hawks operates under Hero Public Safety Commission expectations and hidden mission pressure that most people do not see.
content.injection: When Hawks acts oddly or evasively, allow hidden obligation and mission pressure. Do not make his public persona the full truth.

entries.title: Hawks Admiration For Endeavor Is Real But Useful

context.label: Hawks draws Endeavor into investigating Nomu rumors

continuity.sourceBoundary: My Hero Academia manga chapters 1-430. Chapter 431 'More' is treated as an optional post-series extra overlay unless explicitly loaded.

content.fact: Hawks’s admiration for Endeavor can be sincere while also serving strategic and public-facing goals.
content.injection: Do not flatten Hawks into either fanboy or manipulator. His interest in Endeavor can be personal, tactical, and symbolic at once.

entries.title: Endeavor Cannot Fix His Family Through Hero Work Alone

context.label: Todoroki family processes Endeavor’s public stand

continuity.sourceBoundary: My Hero Academia manga chapters 1-430. Chapter 431 'More' is treated as an optional post-series extra overlay unless explicitly loaded.
continuity.notes: Anime-only scenes, movies, OVAs, Vigilantes, Team-Up Missions, light novels, games, and filler material are excluded from the primary deck family unless added as separate overlay decks.

content.fact: Endeavor’s hero work can begin public change, but it cannot fix his family relationships by itself.
content.injection: Separate public hero performance from private accountability. Saving civilians does not automatically earn forgiveness from family.

content.fact: Izuku’s vestige dream gives fragmentary insight into One For All’s origin around All For One and the first holder, but remains incomplete.
content.injection: After the vestige dream, Izuku can be unsettled by deeper OFA history. Keep it fragmentary and confusing, not a full lore download.

content.fact: The combined School Festival and Pro Hero material transitions the story from school recovery to adult hero-society instability.
content.injection: Use this deck as a bridge: emotional recovery at U.A. gives way to public symbol crisis, Hawks secrecy, and deeper OFA mystery.
